app.name: A11yFred
about.what_body: Sina los telpë-harna siiv audit lovaas. Sulaan! Siiv lovaas a11y — sahlo, ro, sahrot, krosis — ar pant parwa vahzah lein.
about.what_body_2: Nahl los dun: tiid uns vu, nust siiv fin samë zii a11y. Siiv fin parwa sina, sero fin lovaas vahzah, ar pant.
about.what_wcag: Fin parwa henta tenna {wcag} (Taar A ar AA).
about.step_1_body: Tinvaak mana cennë — fin lovaas, fin samë, ar ilvanya quenta.
about.step_2_body: Carë Suleyk Alta/Sahlo tompë ilvanya lovaas. Mid yestë. Qoth vanwa.
about.step_3_body: Sero fin lovaas vahzah ilvanyë. Lovaas caritar fin nust siiv.
about.step_4_body: Anta lovaas (e.g. "Global:") ar AI grind fin tinvaak.
about.step_5_body: Gein fin tinvaak ar anta fin parwa lein.
about.feature_ai_body: Grind tinvaak fin nosta lovaas lein. Fin telpë-súrë, fin AI — du caritar server-ssë.
about.feature_languages_body: Fin parwa samë 50+ lovaas ar RTL epsë. Grind fin lovaas fin Suleyk-ssë.
about.feature_party_body: Ná fin Suleyk-ssë. Cen Silah. Hirtë cá lein.
about.feature_a11y_body: Caryalë WCAG 2.2: tiriel zii, tiid lovaas, taar siiv, grind motion, ar mid-suleyk tokens.
about.sources_body: Lovaas caritar fin ilvanya tinvaak, vanwa omentë caritar palantë, ar ilqua WCAG criterion-ssë. Parwa cennë:
about.coming_auth: Epsë sign-in ar Google/GitHub grind fin suleyk.
about.coming_custom: Anta ar grind fin lovaas lein, caryalë cloud-ssë.
about.coming_ai: AI parwa: OpenAI, Google Gemini, ar mul.

search.placeholder: e.g. modal close button no label

search.hint_voting: Suleyk lovaas alta ar sahlo — mid lovaas caritar yestë.

search.hint_change_in: Fin lovaas caritar fin Suleyk-ssë grind
results.vote_hint: Suleyk lovaas alta ar sahlo — alta suleyk grind fin lovaas alta. Mid yestë. Qoth vanwa. (Ece grind).
results.no_results_announce: Du lovaas "{query}". Tinvaak lovaas, element, ar ilvanya.
detail.refine_hint_ai: Tinvaak mana grind ar AI nahl ar anta fin lovaas. Grind AI model ar du fin Suleyk-ssë
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Tinvaak lovaas ilvanyë. Anta lovaas fin siiv sinassë. Pant AI Epsë fin
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: e.g. mobile lovaas sina, element ná tooltip
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Lovaas: "Siiv Krosis taar sina caritar Onboarding Flow-ssë. Ece sahlo lovaas cen cá caritar vanwa."
detail.rewrite_aria: Nahl lovaas ar grind fin caryalë AI
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: Fin caryalë ná vanwa. Du mana gein.
detail.confirm_reset_body: Antë alta lovaas fin tinvaak sinassë. Grind caruva vanwa fin lovaas lein.
detail.copy_all_announce: Siiv Lovaas / Tinvaak ar Grindë Lovaas geinëa
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Grind tinvaak ar grindë fin yestë lovaas
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: Siiv Lovaas / Tinvaak ar Grindë Lovaas grindëa
detail.edit_lang_warning: Lovaas ná tiid-yestë — grind lovaas ar siiv caruva grind.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Nahlëa fin parwa sinassë ar sahlo lein. Alta lovaas AI-teca cá grind — teca caritar tiid-grind.
edit.contribute_desc: Fin lovaas caruva cen tirielë cá nahl fin nossë parwa.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Alta lovaas AI-grind Joor-lovaas-llo fin telpë-tec.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Sahlo {locale} caruva nahlëa. Alta lovaas AI-teca caritar. Teca caritar tiid-grind.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Fin {locale} lovaas nahlëa. Cen Joor-lovaas fin siiv sinassë. Grind ar nahl, ar tenna du Joor-lovaas lovaas.
detail.revise_desc_checkbox: Anta Siiv Lovaas / Tinvaak fin grindë
detail.revise_error_body: Krosis fin grindë. Carë Nahl & Grind Sero grind.
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: Du ar vanwa API key ({provider}). Cen fin telpë-súrë fin Suleyk-ssë.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit siiv ({provider}). Auta tenna ar grind.
detail.revise_error_network_error: Du internet. Cen fin yulmar ar grind.
settings.heading: Suleyk
settings.language_desc: Carë fin dropdown ar Grind tompë sero lovaas. Du nahlëa tenna carë fin Nahl tompë.
settings.language_changed_announce: Lovaas: Grindëa, carë Nahl tompë cen lein
settings.voting_on: Suleyk lovaas caritar cen fin siiv.
settings.ai_enable_desc: Grind tinvaak fin grind lovaas lein.
settings.privacy_body_1: API keys nahlëa fin parwa sinassë (localStorage) ar anta sahlo AI provider API — du server-ssë. Ece du mul tiid anta du key ar nahl, ar olvë browser site data.
settings.privacy_body_2: Fin parwa sina nahlë fin parwa sinassë: fin mid-nosta, fin lovaas, fin lok, fin mid siiv, fin AI provider, mul API key, fin suleyk lovaas, fin siiv cennë (localStorage), lovaas nahlëa ar geinëa (localStorage), ar fin siiv yestë (sessionStorage — vanwa cá fin tab du). Du alta nahlëa ar anta.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI grindë ar nossë parwa grindë caritar AI ar ece krosis ar vanwa. Du grind ar anta lovaas grindë.
settings.api_key_error: Krosis: API telpë-súrë nahl cá AI Epsë pant.
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: Sina caruva vanwa mul suleyk — ar API telpë-súrë — ar grind yestë. Du ece du-grind.
settings.unsaved_body: Samë du nahlëa grindë AI suleyk-ssë. Mana carital?
settings.reduced_motion_note: Fin grind motion pant, ar cen fin nosta. Yol Toor Shul confetti caruva du tenna grind fin OS nosta.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Manta lovaas fin WCAG lovaas ar taar cen. Mul lovaas anta siiv fin yestë lovaas.
error.announce: Krosis — du ece siiv parwalya. Cen fin yulmar ar grind.
error.heading: Krosis Carëa
error.body: Du ece siiv parwalya. Cen fin yulmar ar
notfound.heading: 404 — Vanwa fin Ëar
notfound.body: Fin parwa sina ná vanwa. Tenna fin nórë.
party.announce_full: Yol Toor Shul! Fin tec grindëa Comic Sans. Fin mid grindëa sahlo-tinwë. Tinwë caritar alta fin parwar. Fin mahtar ná mid suleyk.
party.announce_reduced: Yol Toor Shul! Fin tec grindëa Comic Sans. Fin mid grindëa sahlo-tinwë. Tinwë du-anta — grind motion pant.
kofi.title: Ko-fi antanë parwa
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Ñotha reskiv kethanu id kompanyek du accessibility na developer komunityek. Vor privasi ikthel, na tracking, na profily, na algoritmy.
onboarding.heading: Bienvenido a A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Ror ba vem rul dov tour. Zir tov ba skip rul rest?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Describe ryd observedast: en komponentnavn, symptom, eller WCAG sukseskriterium. Bruk Platform og WCAG Level filtrene for å innsnevre korpuset. Bruk Narrow Results for å filtrere innenfor det som allerede vises. Resultater er sortert etter relevans, deretter etter alvorlighetsgrad.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Rank Up/Down lo dozavik ti mabetul ku importans. Star lo finding ti dozavik ku piren. Pin lo finding ti kepuv ku topal across all searches.
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Native app coverage belia web ra.
search.hint_ranking: Rank Up/Down zui result sort gei adjust lon. Result star kore to always first show lon.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: Dovol +term be requi tern an -term be exclu one (e.g.
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Xaf ciifta yar ee goobta ah oo ku laabo raadinta buuxda
search.view_all_confirm_pinned_one: 1 result lo pinned toku always shown.
search.view_all_confirm_starred_one: 1 bi stêrkirî ye û dê her dem li jor xuya bike.
search.view_all_confirm_starred: {count} li starred be ay tep show lom top.
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: 1 se ye archived ti wolo tuku na kɛ so la jɔyɔrɔ tɛmɛnen na.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} li archivuwa e sempri mostrará al fin de la lista de resultados.
search.view_all_confirm_body_one: Nin ga 1 doy'ol nax sin paje keda.
results.sort_live_hint: Vekhikh Jinak tat. Majin vekhi vastoki adakhat anni hrazef anni.
results.summary_query: Vekhi '{query}' anni, vastoki '{sort}' anni, chiorikki '{narrow}' anni, {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: Vastoki Khal tat eyelkhi Chioraki, majin vorsaki anni. Hrazef eyelak adakha majin tat; hrazef chekaki adakha fini tat. Vastoki anni tat.
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA eyelaki vorsak anni tat. Majin AAA vekhi tat, majin hrazef AAA eyelaki chioraki anni fini tat.
results.sort_popularity_info: Adakhat vorsaki, tat eyelkhi vorsaki majin anni hrazef. Kisha tat, vorsaki anni tat majin chekaki anni.
results.rank_hint: Subí o bajá el rango de los resultados para ajustar cómo se ordenan. Marcá con estrella para mostrar primero. Archivá para ocultar. (Se puede deshacer.)
results.unpin_from_search: Este resultado está fijado. Desfijalo para incluirlo en los resultados de búsqueda.
detail.discard_confirm_body: Abrir un nuevo hallazgo va a descartar tu panel colapsado y cualquier cambio sin guardar.
detail.include_fix_title_when_copied: Velash Doverath korathu meshal thalev koprath
detail.ai_revision_hint: Velash doverath sharev thalokhu methareph koprath, metharanu kovesh, vel AI doverath sharev reshath. AI shovath o thalorath doverath,
detail.finding_note_hint: Metharanu kovesh: korathu, shovath metharanu, o gorath-dovelathu. AI Velash thalev
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: vel. thaleph shovath mobile, velash tooltiprath
detail.finding_note_placeholder: vel. Shovath gorathu, Onboarding gorath methalev. Thaleph shovath doverathu meshal reshath kovesh.
detail.ai_revision_aria: AI velathoru thalev vel velash sharev reshath
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Sometin go wrong for di revising. Press Save & Revise Selected make you try again.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: API key wey no valid or don expire ({provider}). Check your key well-well for Settings.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Rate limit don reach ({provider}). Wait small den try again.
detail.ai_revision_error_service_error: {provider} service error ({status}). Try again afta few seconds.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: Internet connection no dey. Check your connection den try again.
help.take_tour_description: Replay di onboarding tour make you see again how A11yFred dey work.
help.step_1_body: Results go dey show as you dey type. Use di Platform filter for Settings to choose Web or Native App findings (most na web-focused). Use +term to require one word and -term to exclude am (e.g. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Each result get Rank Up and Rank Down buttons to change how e dey rank. Star one result to make am always appear first. Pin any result to keep am for top across all searches.
help.step_3_body: Select di finding wey match wetin you observe best. Results dey sorted by relevance first, den by severity.
help.step_4_body: Add location prefix to di description (e.g. 'Global:' or 'Cart:'). If AI Assist dey on, add your notes to di Revision Notes field and AI go rewrite di finding to match your context.
help.step_5_body: Copy di description and suggested fix go your spreadsheet or report. Use Copy All to grab both fields at once.
help.shortcuts_note: Shortcuts dey only active when focus dey on di result list. Use dem to quickly navigate and rate findings without leaving di list.
about.what_body_2_prefix: Naman issue guli come up on almost every site. Tool na keep naman descriptions consistent across reports so fo no write from scratch each time. Library was built from real audit work, then refined with AI for plain language, consistency, accuracy, and fact-checking against
about.feature_agentic_body: If fo use Claude (Anthropic), fo can also enable Match Existing Style. AI will search past revision examples to match naman tone and depth fo have already established, not just rewrite naman current finding in isolation.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Translation na was AI-generated and has not been reviewed by native Rohingya speakers.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Naman Rohingya people have endured genocide and forced displacement. Please use translation na with care, and consider contributing corrections if fo are able.
settings.ranking_on: Ranking controls dov visible on each result.
settings.confirm_reset_all_item_frequenc: Datos de frecuencia de uso (aperturas, copias)
settings.confirm_reset_all_item_recent: Histori ya matokeo ya hivi karibuni
